root.sql: select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, case when #sum_level#=1 then to_char(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result+1,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') when #sum_level#=3 then to_char(add_months(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result,1),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') when #sum_level#=2 then to_char(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result+7,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') else '' end w1_2, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_name w2, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.vendor_name w4, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.vendor_id vendor_id, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w5, trans_ems.userlabel w6, sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum) w7, sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt180s_num) w8, round(decode(sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum),0,0,sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt180s_num)/sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum))*100,2) w9, sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt300s_num) w10, round(decode(sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum),0,0,sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt300s_num)/sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum))*100,2) w11, sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt600s_num) w12, round(decode(sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum),0,0,sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt600s_num)/sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum))*100,2) w13, round(sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_duration_max),2) w14, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.sum_level w15, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_id ne_id, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.omc_id omc_id from tfa_alarm_delay_sum tfa_alarm_delay_sum left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tfa_alarm_delay_sum.eqp_object_class=tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select distinct userlabel as userlabel,omc_id as omc_id from nrmdb.objects_trans where object_class = 2100) trans_ems on tfa_alarm_delay_sum.omc_id = trans_ems.omc_id where tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_id in (#areaID#) and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_type =10000 and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.vendor_id in (#vendor#) and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.omc_id in (#omcid#) and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.eqp_object_class in (#eqpclass#) group by tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_name , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.vendor_name , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.vendor_id , tia_alarm_dict2.txt , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.sum_level , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.eqp_object_class , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_id , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.omc_id, trans_ems.userlabel order by tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_name , tia_alarm_dict2.txt , trans_ems.userlabel )a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.countsql: select count(*) from (select to_char(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w1, case when #sum_level#=1 then to_char(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result+1,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') when #sum_level#=3 then to_char(add_months(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result,1),'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') when #sum_level#=2 then to_char(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result+7,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') else '' end w1_2, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_name w2, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.vendor_name w4, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.vendor_id vendor_id, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w5, trans_ems.userlabel w6, sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum) w7, sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt180s_num) w8, round(decode(sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum),0,0,sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt180s_num)/sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum))*100,2) w9, sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt300s_num) w10, round(decode(sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum),0,0,sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt300s_num)/sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum))*100,2) w11, sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt600s_num) w12, round(decode(sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum),0,0,sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_delay_gt600s_num)/sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.total_alarm_sum))*100,2) w13, round(sum(tfa_alarm_delay_sum.alarm_duration_max),2) w14, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.sum_level w15, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.eqp_object_class eqp_object_class, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_id ne_id, tfa_alarm_delay_sum.omc_id omc_id from tfa_alarm_delay_sum tfa_alarm_delay_sum left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type=9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tfa_alarm_delay_sum.eqp_object_class=tia_alarm_dict2.id left join (select distinct userlabel as userlabel,omc_id as omc_id from nrmdb.objects_trans where object_class = 2100) trans_ems on tfa_alarm_delay_sum.omc_id = trans_ems.omc_id where tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result >=to_date('#time1#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result <=to_date('#time2#','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.sum_level=#sum_level# and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_id in (#areaID#) and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_type =10000 and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.vendor_id in (#vendor#) and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.omc_id in (#omcid#) and tfa_alarm_delay_sum.eqp_object_class in (#eqpclass#) group by tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_name , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.vendor_name , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.vendor_id , tia_alarm_dict2.txt , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.sum_level , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.eqp_object_class , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_id , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.omc_id, trans_ems.userlabel order by tfa_alarm_delay_sum.first_result , tfa_alarm_delay_sum.ne_name , tia_alarm_dict2.txt , trans_ems.userlabel )

Conditions.Condition: select distinct province_name as text,province_id as value from region_city_local union all select 'Unknown' as text,99999999 as value from dual order by text asc
select distinct zh_name as text,type as value from vendor_name where type in(select distinct vendor_id from tfa_alarm_delay_sum)
select id value,txt text from tia_alarm_dict where tia_alarm_dict.type=9 and id in(select distinct eqp_object_class from tfa_alarm_delay_sum)
select distinct userlabel as text,omc_id as value from nrmdb.objects_trans where object_class = 2100

root.detailSql:
select * from (select a.*,rowNum m_rowNum from (select tfa_alarm_delay_detail.province_name w1, vendor_name.zh_name w2, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w3, tfa_alarm_delay_detail.ne_label w4, tia_alarm_dict3.txt w5, tfa_alarm_delay_detail.eqp_label w6, tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_title_text w7, tia_alarm_dict4.txt w8, to_char(tfa_alarm_delay_detail.event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w9, to_char(tfa_alarm_delay_detail.cancel_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w10, to_char(to_date('1970-01-01 01:00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')+tfa_alarm_delay_detail.time_stamp/24/60/60,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w11, tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text0||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text1||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text2||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text3||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text4||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text5||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text6||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text7||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text8||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text9||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text10||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text11||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text12||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text13||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text14||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text15 w12 from tfa_alarm_delay_detail tfa_alarm_delay_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tia_alarm_dict2.id = tfa_alarm_delay_detail.object_class left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9) tia_alarm_dict3 on tia_alarm_dict3.id = tfa_alarm_delay_detail.eqp_object_class left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =6 ) tia_alarm_dict4 on tfa_alarm_delay_detail.org_severity = tia_alarm_dict4.id left join vendor_name vendor_name on tfa_alarm_delay_detail.vendor_id = vendor_name.type where tfa_alarm_delay_detail.first_result >= to_date('@w1@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_delay_detail.first_result < to_date('@w1_2@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_delay_detail.province_id=@ne_id@ and tfa_alarm_delay_detail.vendor_id = @vendor_id@ and tfa_alarm_delay_detail.eqp_object_class = @eqp_object_class@ and tfa_alarm_delay_detail.omc_id = @omc_id@ {0} order by tfa_alarm_delay_detail.event_time
)a ) Where m_rowNum > #BegeinIndex# and m_rowNum <= #EndIndex#
root.detailCountSql: select count(*) from (select tfa_alarm_delay_detail.province_name w1, vendor_name.zh_name w2, tia_alarm_dict2.txt w3, tfa_alarm_delay_detail.ne_label w4, tia_alarm_dict3.txt w5, tfa_alarm_delay_detail.eqp_label w6, tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_title_text w7, tia_alarm_dict4.txt w8, to_char(tfa_alarm_delay_detail.event_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w9, to_char(to_date('1970-01-01 01:00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')+tfa_alarm_delay_detail.time_stamp/24/60/60,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w11, to_char(tfa_alarm_delay_detail.cancel_time,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') w10, tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text0||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text1||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text2||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text3||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text4||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text5||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text6||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text7||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text8||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text9||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text10||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text11||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text12||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text13||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text14||tfa_alarm_delay_detail.alarm_text15 w12 from tfa_alarm_delay_detail tfa_alarm_delay_detail left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9) tia_alarm_dict2 on tia_alarm_dict2.id = tfa_alarm_delay_detail.object_class left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type = 9) tia_alarm_dict3 on tia_alarm_dict3.id = tfa_alarm_delay_detail.eqp_object_class left join (select id,txt from tia_alarm_dict where type =6 ) tia_alarm_dict4 on tfa_alarm_delay_detail.org_severity = tia_alarm_dict4.id left join vendor_name vendor_name on tfa_alarm_delay_detail.vendor_id = vendor_name.type where tfa_alarm_delay_detail.first_result >= to_date('@w1@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_delay_detail.first_result < to_date('@w1_2@','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and tfa_alarm_delay_detail.province_id=@ne_id@ and tfa_alarm_delay_detail.vendor_id = @vendor_id@ and tfa_alarm_delay_detail.eqp_object_class = @eqp_object_class@ and tfa_alarm_delay_detail.omc_id = @omc_id@ {0} order by tfa_alarm_delay_detail.event_time )
